steps.title: Determine what the blank must mean
steps.content:
The fork fern has the largest known genome. Because extremely large genomes carry "high biological costs," the sentence suggests evolutionary pressure prevents any genome from growing even larger — so this record is unlikely to be [blank]. The blank must mean "surpassed" or "beaten by something larger."
  • Choice A — 'protracted': means drawn out or prolonged; doesn't relate to a record being beaten ✗
  • Choice B — 'superseded': means replaced or surpassed by something better or larger; perfectly fits "the largest known genome is unlikely to be exceeded" ✓
  • Choice C — 'curtailed': means cut short or reduced; the passage discusses size records, not reduction ✗
  • Choice D — 'obviated': means made unnecessary; a genome record can't be made unnecessary ✗

steps.title: Confirm with the passage logic
steps.content:
High biological costs act as a natural ceiling on genome size — organisms with huge genomes pay severe penalties, so evolution is unlikely to produce an even larger one. The fork fern's record is therefore unlikely to be superseded (surpassed by another organism's genome).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
